comfyui.notes: Example only. User must install and run ComfyUI locally. Codex must not download models.

sd-webui.notes: Example only. User must install and run Stable Diffusion WebUI locally. Codex must not download models.

manual-drop.notes: Safe default workflow. User creates images locally and drops raw files into the repo.

deterministic-fallback.notes: Fallback diagrams only. Do not describe these as real image model output.
